commit_message: docs(closeout): reconcile cognition for cluster POL-558

polaris_md_updates.change_summary: Documented that createDraftPr/buildPrBody in github.ts now embed a Provider routing section in the PR body, sourced from the dispatch record or run telemetry via summarizeRouterOutcomes().

summary_md_updates.change_summary: Added current-state note that PR bodies now include a Provider routing section with selected provider/adapter/mode and a routing-anomaly review.

evidence_summary: Reviewed the three completed children (POL-559: github.ts adds a Provider routing section to PR bodies via computeRoutingSummary()/summarizeRouterOutcomes(); POL-560: unit-test-only addition covering resolveProviderAndMode, no behavior change; POL-561: src/loop/POLARIS.md already documents provider-selection modes and was current). Updated src/finalize/POLARIS.md and src/finalize/SUMMARY.md to document the new Provider routing section in createDraftPr/buildPrBody, since this is a material, previously-undocumented capability. src/loop/POLARIS.md and src/loop/SUMMARY.md were already accurate after POL-561's own edit and required no further change. Root src/POLARIS.md and src/SUMMARY.md needed no change — the new behavior is finalize-local detail already covered at the folder level. No smartdocs/raw candidates related to this cluster were found (existing raw docs predate this cluster and are unrelated); no cognition notes were pending; Medic did not run for this cluster. All references in updated files were verified to resolve. One commit created containing only the two allowed doc files.
